turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, uh, I wanted to check if Dr. Nandini Kulkarni is working this week. She's in gynaecology I believe.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me see what I can do. Could you tell me if this is for a new appointment or something else?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: It's a sensitive follow-up. She asked me to come back in six weeks and I want to make sure she specifically is available, not a replacement.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I completely understand — you want to see Dr. Nandini Kulkarni specifically. I don't have access to real-time specialist schedules or exceptions in their availability here. Giving you incorrect information about her specific schedule could cause a wasted trip. The right thing is to connect you to our staff who can confirm directly. Please hold while I transfer you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Transferring you now. Our team will confirm Dr. Kulkarni's schedule for you. Thank you for your patience.
